name: io.github.rishimeka/genesys-memory
description: Causal graph memory engine for AI agents with scoring, activation, and forgetting

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for embedding generation (optional — use GENESYS_EMBEDDER=local for no API key)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for LLM-based memory processing (optional)
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
